Interface IMapTableInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to the Table Info.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("08AB1BE0-D464-4882-A721-D72FBB36903A")]
public interface IMapTableInfo

Properties

DisplayField

Primary display field.

string DisplayField { get; }

Property Value

string

Fields

Array of attribute fields contained in the table.

IFields Fields { get; }

Indicates if the layer has HTML popups enabled.

esriServerHTMLPopupType HTMLPopupType { get; }

esriServerHTMLPopupType

Sample Snippet

HasAttachments

Indicates if the layer has attachments.

bool HasAttachments { get; }

bool

Sample Snippet

HasSubtype

Indicates if the layer has Subtype.

bool HasSubtype { get; }

Property Value

bool

Examples

Sample Snippet

ID

The table ID. This is a unique ID among layers and tables, and is used to identify the table in a number of methods.

int ID { get; }

Property Value

int

Sample Snippet

Name

Descriptive name of the table.

string Name { get; }

Property Value

string

The name of the OID Field.

string
